response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators at re:cinq, which directly maps to one of the listed key technologies. However, the resume shows no demonstrated track record of shipping production GenAI solutions, no explicit RAG/vector database experience, no cloud-platform AI system design, and limited customer-facing technical-leadership signal expected at staff level for a Forward Deployed role.
strengths: Current role involves MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling
Deep full-stack background across TypeScript, Node.js, and multiple languages
Strong software-craftsmanship and mentoring signal (workshops, talks, TDD advocacy)
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation pipeline experience listed
Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz; no AI systems on cloud platforms
Minimal evidence of customer-facing discovery or enterprise delivery leadership

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow work
